---
title: Digital Design and FPGA Prototyping of a Mixed-Signal LED Driver System.
author:
 - name: Sneha Shree Katepalli
   Matriculation number: 5364673
   email: snehashree499@gmail.com
   affiliations:
      - Hochschule Bremen
citation:
  url: https://gitlab.on.hs-bremen.de/skatepalli/thesis_sneha
---

{{< include /content/_sec_probstatement.qmd >}}
{{< include /content/_sec_objectives.qmd >}}
{{< include /content/_sec_approach.qmd >}}
{{< include /content/_sec_wp.qmd >}}
{{< include /content/_sec_expec_res.qmd >}}
{{< include /content/_sec_Timeline.qmd >}}
